title: Designing delightful frontends with GPT-5.4 | OpenAI Developers
summary: Practical techniques for steering GPT-5.4 toward polished, production-ready frontend designs.
guidance: stronger image understanding throughout the design process
more functionally complete apps and websites
better use of tools to inspect, test, and verify its own work
Select low reasoning level to begin with.
Define your design system and constraints upfront (i.e., typography, color palette, layout).
Provide visual references or a mood board (i.e., attach a screenshot) to provide visual guardrails for the model.

actions.rationale: Sync official learnings into a retrieval-first, non-constitutional document.
Potential retrieval and compaction guidance; requires governed review before changing runtime behavior.
Potential frontend quality guidance; keep proposal-only until independently validated.
Potential eval coverage change; requires explicit validation and proposal review.
Potential specialist coverage update; keep proposal-only until the need is validated.
